task_completion.description: Zotero application is open and the library containing the target papers is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible, displaying the library with the target papers (e.g., 'Attention Is All You Need', 'Deep Learning').

task_completion.description: The file 'vaswani2017_transformers.pdf' is attached to 'Attention Is All You Need' as a stored copy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Zotero, expanding the item 'Attention Is All You Need' in the middle pane or checking the right pane shows an attached PDF named 'vaswani2017_transformers.pdf'. The PDF icon should not have a chain link overlay (which would indicate a linked file).

task_completion.description: The file 'lecun2015_deep_learning_review.pdf' is attached to 'Deep Learning' as a stored copy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Zotero, expanding the item 'Deep Learning' shows an attached PDF named 'lecun2015_deep_learning_review.pdf' without a chain link overlay on its icon.

task_completion.description: The file 'krizhevsky2012_imagenet.pdf' is attached to 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' as a stored copy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Zotero, expanding the item 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' shows an attached PDF named 'krizhevsky2012_imagenet.pdf' without a chain link overlay on its icon.

task_completion.description: The file 'he2016_residual_learning.pdf' is attached to 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' as a stored copy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Zotero, expanding the item 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' shows an attached PDF named 'he2016_residual_learning.pdf' without a chain link overlay on its icon.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Zotero application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Zotero GUI being used to attach the files, rather than a text editor or database browser modifying Zotero's SQLite database directly.

integrity.description: The attachments are properly registered and visible in the Zotero GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attached PDFs are visible within the Zotero application interface, confirming they were not just moved into the storage directory via terminal without updating the application.

integrity.description: The agent attached the files from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog or file manager window shows the files being selected or dragged from '/home/ga/Documents/PDFs/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires attaching 4 specific synthetic PDF files to 4 specific papers in Zotero. The correct mappings are: 1. 'vaswani2017_transformers.pdf' to 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.); 2. 'lecun2015_deep_learning_review.pdf' to 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton); 3. 'krizhevsky2012_imagenet.pdf' to 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al.); 4. 'he2016_residual_learning.pdf' to 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al.). The files must be attached as stored copies, which is the default behavior when dragging and dropping or using 'Attach Stored Copy of File'. Stored copies have a standard PDF icon, whereas linked copies have a small chain link overlay on the icon.
